Off Calendar Nov-08-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's petition for an order to show cause regarding contempt for failing to appear for deposition will be ordered off calendar unless defendant submits a valid proof of service. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
